g.text: MQ ACK/NACK Protocol: Technical Implementation Blueprint
SCENARIO B: Negative Acknowledgment (NACK) with Immediate Retry

ul.li: Acknowledge (ACK): Atomic removal from In-Flight set. Clears visibility timeout.
Negative-Ack (NACK): Explicit failure. Bypasses standard TTL/timeout to trigger immediate re-processing.
Consumer Affinity: Broker excludes the NACK-ing consumer from the immediate redelivery pool for that specific message.
Idempotency: Downstream systems MUST handle Scenario B where Msg 99 is processed by both A (partial) and B (full).

g.text: Targeted to different consumer to avoid stuck-state affinity
